features: Ideal for aches and pains in muscles and joints.
Lasts for up to 8hrs. Heats up to 57°C. Works Instantly.
Unit count: 1.0; Unit count type: count
description: Product Description MASTER PLASTER S/A HEAT PADS 2PK Indications Pain in muscles and joints Directions Apply the self-adhesive heating pad to the affected area, ensuring it's not directly on the skin. Use for a maximum of 8 hours, being aware that it can heat up to 57°C. Safety Warning Do not apply directly to the skin. Keep away from heat sources and open flames. Do not use while sleeping or bathing. Keep out of reach of children. Do not use if you have a pacemaker or other medical device that may be affected by heat. Consult a doctor before use if you are pregnant or have a medical condition. Use only as directed. Discontinue use if skin irritation occurs. See more
